headlines.description: — Marcus Mariota and the Atlanta Falcons are still under .500 and still in the thick of the NFC South race.
headlines.shortLinkText: Koo's late 53-yard FG lifts Falcons past Fields, Bears 27-24

headlines.description: — The Buffalo Bills dug out of their snowy homes and got their groove back in the Motor City.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills beat Browns 31-23 after snow shifts game to Motor City

headlines.description: — When Jalen Hurts saw the middle of the field open up, he tucked the ball and ran.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Hurts' late TD run gives Eagles 17-16 win over Colts

events.name: New York Jets at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — The NFL went 10 weeks and hundreds of kicks without a player returning a punt for a touchdown. Marcus Jones made the first of the season one to remember.
headlines.shortLinkText: Marcus Jones' late punt return lifts Patriots over Jets 10-3

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Andy Dalton could sense the Rams' Aaron Donald closing quickly from the left edge on a third-and-9 play late in the third quarter of a three-point game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dalton thrives, Stafford leaves as Saints top Rams 27-20

events.name: Detroit Lions at New York Giants

headlines.description: — While the Detroit Lions are starting to find their way under second-year coach Dan Campbell, the New York Giants looked lost for the first time this season under first-year coach Brian Daboll.
headlines.shortLinkText: Williams leads Lions to 3rd straight win, 31-18 over Giants

headlines.description: — Lamar Jackson and the Ravens were struggling to reach the end zone — until Baltimore's takeaway-happy defense made that task a good bit easier.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late turnovers help Ravens hold off Panthers 13-3

headlines.description: — After Taylor Heinicke led the Washington Commanders to yet another win, coach Ron Rivera made the announcement that had become inevitable: Heinicke is no longer the backup to Carson Wentz.
headlines.shortLinkText: Heinicke wins starting job after Commanders top Texans 23-10

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Denver Broncos

headlines.description: — Derek Carr stepped up in crunch time after Russell Wilson shunned the slide that would have made his counterpart's heroics so much harder.
headlines.shortLinkText: Adams' 35-yard TD in OT powers Raiders past Broncos 22-16

headlines.description: — The Dallas Cowboys had some hard conversations with each other after their collapse last week at Green Bay.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cowboys crush Vikings' 7-game win streak with 40-3 romp

headlines.description: — So much for the Cincinnati Bengals struggling to score without Ja'Marr Chase. Or Joe Mixon for that matter.
headlines.shortLinkText: Burrow throws 4 TD passes, Bengals rally past Steelers 37-30

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Patrick Mahomes and Travis Kelce ended up putting on a performance that made The Fonz proud.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kelce scores 3 touchdowns, Chiefs rally past Chargers 30-27
